settings.heading: Premium connectivity built for cleaner setups, faster decisions, and stronger support continuity
settings.copy: Use the homepage to balance category discovery, product confidence, and support entry points so shoppers can move from interest to action without friction.
settings.panel_copy: This hero now supports category discovery, compare-entry points, and support handoff without changing the underlying Shopify-native architecture.

settings.heading: Start with the product family that matches the workflow
settings.copy: Use this module to lead shoppers into the right collection faster, with clearer differentiation between core categories.

settings.title: Hubs and adapters
settings.copy: Compact connectivity solutions for everyday device expansion, travel setups, and quick productivity upgrades.

settings.title: Docking stations
settings.copy: Desk-ready solutions for multi-display, multi-device, and higher-capacity workspace setups.

settings.title: Chargers and power
settings.copy: Charging and power accessories designed for cleaner travel kits, desktop power, and reliable daily use.

settings.title: Cables and accessories
settings.copy: Supporting accessories and add-ons that complete the setup without sending customers into a dead-end utility page.

settings.heading: Build confidence before the shopper ever hits the product page
settings.copy: Use these story modules to explain why the catalog is easier to shop, compare, and support than a generic accessories grid.

settings.title: Feature-led merchandising
settings.copy: Lead with product utility, technical clarity, and setup confidence instead of generic campaign filler.

settings.title: Comparison and buying guidance
settings.copy: Make product differences legible early so shoppers can narrow the right option without guesswork.

settings.title: Support and compatibility pathways
settings.copy: Keep downloads, manuals, compatibility, and troubleshooting visible as part of the main customer journey.

settings.heading: Support routes are visible from the first page
settings.copy: The support layer should feel like part of the storefront, helping with product confidence before and after purchase.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Drivers, firmware, and utilities tied to product readiness and post-purchase confidence.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Guides and setup documentation that shorten the path from unboxing to a working setup.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.copy: Compatibility guidance for device, platform, and workflow fit before a purchase becomes a support issue.

settings.heading: Editorial and education framework
settings.copy: Use editorial content to support buying confidence, setup guidance, and product education instead of treating the blog like an afterthought.

settings.heading: Move from discovery into products, compare, or support with less friction
settings.copy: Close the homepage with a strong shopping action and a practical secondary support path so the journey stays clear.
